scripts.db:generate: pnpm db:use-dev && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma generate
scripts.db:generate:prod: pnpm db:use-prod && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm db:use-dev && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: pnpm db:use-prod && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:studio: pnpm db:use-dev && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma studio
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:use-dev && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma migrate reset
scripts.setup:dev: pnpm install && node infrastructure/scripts/db-schema.js dev && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('packages/shared/dev-data',{recursive:true})" && cd packages/shared && pnpm prisma generate && pnpm prisma migrate dev --name init && pnpm prisma:seed
